name: Vicki's Fresh Fruit Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Pureed fruit (choice - berries, peaches, bananas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in an ice cream freezer.
2. Freeze according to manufacturers directions.
3. Makes 1 1/2 quarts.
This is the best fruit ice cream. Great for picnics because you don't have to cook it.
